creative_brief.visual_style: Focus on urban landscapes and street-style photography to capture the essence of everyday wear. Highlight diverse individuals and scenarios to showcase versatility and broad appeal.
creative_brief.conceptual_technique: Integrated storytelling through digital and social media platforms, emphasizing user-generated content and influencer partnerships to leverage authenticity and community engagement
creative_brief.typography_style: Bold, vintage-inspired sans-serif with a slight distressed texture for an authentic retro feel
creative_brief.color_scheme: classic Adidas white and black with pops of urban graffiti colors like electric blue and fiery red

psychographics.values: appreciation for heritage and authenticity, desire for self-expression
